summary: P0 BLOCKER FIX - Purchase Flow Consolidation VERIFIED. Backend now queries branches collection for warehouse validation (line 465-475). Both Quick Purchase and Buat PO modal work correctly with warehouse_name from branches. Discount calculations verified: qty=10, price=10000, disc=10% = subtotal 90,000.

warehouse_name is populated from branches collection in saved PO
Discount calculation formula verified: subtotal = qty * price * (1 - discount_percent/100)
Quick Purchase warehouse dropdown shows branches data (e.g., '3 FRONT', '3 KIOS LAMPIHONG')
Buat PO modal warehouse dropdown shows 103 branches options
All UI elements properly wired with data-testid attributes
